title: muraltia
intro: Muraltia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "puzzle bush" due to its unique and complex leaf structure. The medicinal properties of Muraltia have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Muraltia include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Muraltia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa and other parts of the world.
